description: Position outcomes, execution history, and raw trade evidence.

panels.title: Realized PnL

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(realized_pnl_usd), 0) AS value FROM v_position_performance WHERE COALESCE(closed_at, opened_at) >= $__timeFrom() AND COALESCE(closed_at, opened_at) <= $__timeTo() AND COALESCE(source::text, '') ~* '^(${source:regex})$' AND COALESCE(exit_profile::text, '') ~* '^(${exitProfile:regex})$' AND COALESCE(status::text, '') ~* '^(${positionStatus:regex})$' AND COALESCE(config_version::text, '') ~* '^(${configVersion:regex})$' AND ('${positionId}' = '' OR COALESCE(id::text, '') ILIKE '%' || '${positionId}' || '%') AND ('${mint}' = '' OR COALESCE(mint::text, '') ILIKE '%' || '${mint}' || '%') AND ('${symbol}' = '' OR COALESCE(symbol::text, '') ILIKE '%' || '${symbol}' || '%')

panels.description: Realized PnL across the selected position set.

panels.title: Win Rate

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE((SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'CLOSED' AND realized_pnl_usd > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::numeric / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'CLOSED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0)) * 100, 0) AS value FROM v_position_performance WHERE COALESCE(closed_at, opened_at) >= $__timeFrom() AND COALESCE(closed_at, opened_at) <= $__timeTo() AND COALESCE(source::text, '') ~* '^(${source:regex})$' AND COALESCE(exit_profile::text, '') ~* '^(${exitProfile:regex})$' AND COALESCE(status::text, '') ~* '^(${positionStatus:regex})$' AND COALESCE(config_version::text, '') ~* '^(${configVersion:regex})$' AND ('${positionId}' = '' OR COALESCE(id::text, '') ILIKE '%' || '${positionId}' || '%') AND ('${mint}' = '' OR COALESCE(mint::text, '') ILIKE '%' || '${mint}' || '%') AND ('${symbol}' = '' OR COALESCE(symbol::text, '') ILIKE '%' || '${symbol}' || '%')

panels.description: Closed-position win rate for the current slice.

panels.title: Median Hold Minutes

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY hold_minutes), 0) AS value FROM v_position_performance WHERE COALESCE(closed_at, opened_at) >= $__timeFrom() AND COALESCE(closed_at, opened_at) <= $__timeTo() AND status = 'CLOSED' AND COALESCE(source::text, '') ~* '^(${source:regex})$' AND COALESCE(exit_profile::text, '') ~* '^(${exitProfile:regex})$' AND COALESCE(status::text, '') ~* '^(${positionStatus:regex})$' AND COALESCE(config_version::text, '') ~* '^(${configVersion:regex})$' AND ('${positionId}' = '' OR COALESCE(id::text, '') ILIKE '%' || '${positionId}' || '%') AND ('${mint}' = '' OR COALESCE(mint::text, '') ILIKE '%' || '${mint}' || '%') AND ('${symbol}' = '' OR COALESCE(symbol::text, '') ILIKE '%' || '${symbol}' || '%')

panels.description: Median hold time to avoid mean distortion from long-tail positions.

panels.title: Median Return %

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY realized_pnl_pct), 0) AS value FROM v_position_performance WHERE COALESCE(closed_at, opened_at) >= $__timeFrom() AND COALESCE(closed_at, opened_at) <= $__timeTo() AND status = 'CLOSED' AND COALESCE(source::text, '') ~* '^(${source:regex})$' AND COALESCE(exit_profile::text, '') ~* '^(${exitProfile:regex})$' AND COALESCE(status::text, '') ~* '^(${positionStatus:regex})$' AND COALESCE(config_version::text, '') ~* '^(${configVersion:regex})$' AND ('${positionId}' = '' OR COALESCE(id::text, '') ILIKE '%' || '${positionId}' || '%') AND ('${mint}' = '' OR COALESCE(mint::text, '') ILIKE '%' || '${mint}' || '%') AND ('${symbol}' = '' OR COALESCE(symbol::text, '') ILIKE '%' || '${symbol}' || '%')

panels.description: Median realized return to keep one outlier from lying about the book.

panels.title: Closed Positions

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM v_position_performance WHERE COALESCE(closed_at, opened_at) >= $__timeFrom() AND COALESCE(closed_at, opened_at) <= $__timeTo() AND status = 'CLOSED' AND COALESCE(source::text, '') ~* '^(${source:regex})$' AND COALESCE(exit_profile::text, '') ~* '^(${exitProfile:regex})$' AND COALESCE(status::text, '') ~* '^(${positionStatus:regex})$' AND COALESCE(config_version::text, '') ~* '^(${configVersion:regex})$' AND ('${positionId}' = '' OR COALESCE(id::text, '') ILIKE '%' || '${positionId}' || '%') AND ('${mint}' = '' OR COALESCE(mint::text, '') ILIKE '%' || '${mint}' || '%') AND ('${symbol}' = '' OR COALESCE(symbol::text, '') ILIKE '%' || '${symbol}' || '%')

panels.description: Closed positions contributing to the selected result set.

panels.title: Daily Realized PnL

targets.rawSql: SELECT session_date::timestamp AS "time", exit_profile AS metric, realized_pnl_usd AS value FROM v_position_pnl_daily WHERE session_date::timestamp >= $__timeFrom() AND session_date::timestamp <= $__timeTo() AND COALESCE(source::text, '') ~* '^(${source:regex})$' AND COALESCE(exit_profile::text, '') ~* '^(${exitProfile:regex})$' AND COALESCE(config_version::text, '') ~* '^(${configVersion:regex})$' ORDER BY 1, 2

panels.description: Daily PnL split by exit profile.

panels.title: Exit Reason Trend

targets.rawSql: SELECT session_date::timestamp AS "time", exit_reason AS metric, position_count AS value FROM v_position_exit_reason_daily WHERE session_date::timestamp >= $__timeFrom() AND session_date::timestamp <= $__timeTo() AND COALESCE(source::text, '') ~* '^(${source:regex})$' AND COALESCE(exit_reason::text, '') ~* '^(${exitReason:regex})$' AND COALESCE(config_version::text, '') ~* '^(${configVersion:regex})$' ORDER BY 1, 2

panels.description: Exit-reason trend to separate strategy behavior from execution fallout.

panels.title: Position Performance

targets.rawSql: SELECT id, mint, symbol, source, config_version, exit_profile, status, exit_reason, opened_at, closed_at, amount_usd, gross_exit_usd, realized_pnl_usd, realized_pnl_pct, hold_minutes FROM v_position_performance WHERE COALESCE(closed_at, opened_at) >= $__timeFrom() AND COALESCE(closed_at, opened_at) <= $__timeTo() AND COALESCE(source::text, '') ~* '^(${source:regex})$' AND COALESCE(exit_profile::text, '') ~* '^(${exitProfile:regex})$' AND COALESCE(status::text, '') ~* '^(${positionStatus:regex})$' AND COALESCE(config_version::text, '') ~* '^(${configVersion:regex})$' AND ('${positionId}' = '' OR COALESCE(id::text, '') ILIKE '%' || '${positionId}' || '%') AND ('${mint}' = '' OR COALESCE(mint::text, '') ILIKE '%' || '${mint}' || '%') AND ('${symbol}' = '' OR COALESCE(symbol::text, '') ILIKE '%' || '${symbol}' || '%') ORDER BY opened_at DESC LIMIT 100

panels.description: Position-level outcome table for focused drill-downs.

panels.title: Fill Trail

targets.rawSql: SELECT created_at, side, position_id, mint, symbol, source, config_version, exit_profile, price_usd, amount_usd, pnl_usd, tx_signature FROM v_recent_fill_activity WHERE created_at >= $__timeFrom() AND created_at <= $__timeTo() AND COALESCE(source::text, '') ~* '^(${source:regex})$' AND ('${positionId}' = '' OR COALESCE(position_id::text, '') ILIKE '%' || '${positionId}' || '%') AND ('${mint}' = '' OR COALESCE(mint::text, '') ILIKE '%' || '${mint}' || '%') AND ('${symbol}' = '' OR COALESCE(symbol::text, '') ILIKE '%' || '${symbol}' || '%') ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 100

panels.description: Execution trail for the selected position slice.

panels.title: Snapshot Evidence

targets.rawSql: SELECT captured_at, mint, symbol, trigger, source, config_version, price_usd, liquidity_usd, volume_5m_usd, buy_sell_ratio, top10_holder_percent, security_risk, position_status, position_exit_reason FROM v_token_snapshot_enriched WHERE captured_at >= $__timeFrom() AND captured_at <= $__timeTo() AND COALESCE(source::text, '') ~* '^(${source:regex})$' AND ('${mint}' = '' OR COALESCE(mint::text, '') ILIKE '%' || '${mint}' || '%') AND ('${symbol}' = '' OR COALESCE(symbol::text, '') ILIKE '%' || '${symbol}' || '%') ORDER BY captured_at DESC LIMIT 100

panels.description: Position-linked snapshot trail for trade RCA.

list.definition: SELECT id::text AS __value, COALESCE(name, id)::text AS __text FROM "StrategyPack" WHERE status <> 'RETIRED' ORDER BY 2
list.label: Pack
list.name: pack
list.query: SELECT id::text AS __value, COALESCE(name, id)::text AS __text FROM "StrategyPack" WHERE status <> 'RETIRED' ORDER BY 2

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT config_version::text AS __text, config_version::text AS __value FROM "ConfigSnapshot" ORDER BY config_version::int DESC
list.label: Config Version
list.name: configVer
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT config_version::text AS __text, config_version::text AS __value FROM "ConfigSnapshot" ORDER BY config_version::int DESC

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT source AS __text, source AS __value FROM v_position_pnl_daily ORDER BY 1
list.label: Source
list.name: source
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT source AS __text, source AS __value FROM v_position_pnl_daily ORDER BY 1

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT status AS __text, status AS __value FROM v_position_performance ORDER BY 1
list.label: Position Status
list.name: positionStatus
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT status AS __text, status AS __value FROM v_position_performance ORDER BY 1

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT exit_reason AS __text, exit_reason AS __value FROM v_position_exit_reason_daily ORDER BY 1
list.label: Exit Reason
list.name: exitReason
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT exit_reason AS __text, exit_reason AS __value FROM v_position_exit_reason_daily ORDER BY 1

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT exit_profile AS __text, exit_profile AS __value FROM v_position_pnl_daily ORDER BY 1
list.label: Exit Profile
list.name: exitProfile
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT exit_profile AS __text, exit_profile AS __value FROM v_position_pnl_daily ORDER BY 1

list.definition: SELECT config_version::text AS __text, config_version AS __value FROM v_config_change_log ORDER BY config_version DESC
list.label: Config Version
list.name: configVersion
list.query: SELECT config_version::text AS __text, config_version AS __value FROM v_config_change_log ORDER BY config_version DESC

title: Position & PnL Analytics
